name: Texas Car Title and Payday Loan Services, Inc.
description_short: Texas Car Title and Payday Loan Services, Inc. at 2519 S Main St, Pearland, TX 77581 is Mon-Fri 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.9 stars across 159 reviews. Call +1 832-736-9494.
description_long:
Texas Car Title and Payday Loan Services, Inc. is a local lending operation based in Sunnyvale, Texas, serving the Dallas metropolitan area including Forney, Mesquite, Garland, and Balch Springs. The company specializes in short-term emergency financing solutions designed to provide rapid cash access to consumers facing unexpected expenses. Operating from their physical location at 3535 North Belt Line Road, they emphasize same-day approval and fast funding timelines to meet urgent borrowing needs.

The company offers three primary loan products: car title loans (borrowing against a vehicle's equity), payday loans (short-term advances based on income), and installment loans (fixed-term personal loans with structured repayment). All three products explicitly advertise no credit check requirements and maximum loan amounts up to $15,000. Applicants can initiate the process online or in-person, with approval designed to occur within approximately 30 minutes of providing required documentation. The company emphasizes that borrowers can keep and drive their vehicles while repaying title loans, and highlights electronic same-day or next-day funding deposits.

What distinguishes this lender is their emphasis on accessibility for borrowers with poor or limited credit history, their local brick-and-mortar presence with stated office hours (Monday-Friday 10AM-6PM, Saturday 9AM-1PM), and their vehicle-as-collateral model that eliminates traditional credit evaluation. They position themselves as serving consumers facing medical bills, car repairs, and other emergency expenses. The company provides detailed FAQs and application information across their website, though specific APR, fee structures, and loan terms are not published on the provided pages.

This is a traditional high-risk lending model typical of the title and payday loan industry. While the company offers genuine emergency liquidity to underserved borrowers, these loan products carry significant financial risk due to typical industry practices around interest rates, fees, and repayment cycles. Consumers should carefully review complete loan terms, total cost of borrowing, and rollover policies before committing, as these details are not disclosed in the website excerpts provided.
pros: Same-day approval and funding within 30 minutes of document submission
No credit check required for any loan product
Borrowers keep and continue driving their vehicle while repaying title loans
Maximum loan amounts up to $15,000 available
Multiple loan types (title, payday, installment) to suit different needs
Physical local storefront with established office hours in Sunnyvale
Online application option combined with in-store assistance and vehicle inspection
cons: APR, fees, and total cost of borrowing are not disclosed on the website, making comparison impossible
Title and payday loans are high-cost products with typical industry APRs often exceeding 100-400%
No information provided about rollover policies, renewal fees, or consequences of missed payments
Loan amounts depend on vehicle appraisal and condition, creating uncertainty for applicants
Default on a title loan risks vehicle repossession, though this risk is not explicitly addressed on the site
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history facing urgent cash needs
Vehicle owners needing emergency liquidity and willing to use their car as collateral
Borrowers requiring same-day funding for medical bills, car repairs, or other unexpected expenses
Short-term cash flow gaps for individuals with steady income but limited emergency savings
diagnosis: This lender is best for credit-challenged consumers facing genuine emergency expenses who own paid-off vehicles and need rapid cash access that traditional lenders won't provide. The primary caveat is that title and payday loans are expensive financial products with hidden costs not disclosed on this website—borrowers must obtain and compare complete loan terms, APRs, and fees before applying, as these emergency loans often cost far more than the borrowed amount when fully repaid.
services: Car title loans with same-day approval up to $15,000
Payday loans based on income verification
Installment loans with fixed monthly payment terms
Online loan application and request forms
Electronic same-day or next-business-day fund deposits
In-person loan consultation and paperwork processing
Multi-location service covering Forney, Sunnyvale, Mesquite, Garland, and Balch Springs
